_meta.name: Canonical ERP+MES+eQMS 7-Layer Core
_meta.description: Execution-grade canonical schema map aligned to ISA-95, SAP, Oracle, Dynamics, and regulated eQMS controls.

notes.content: One party master, one item master, one organization hierarchy.
Orders keep released BOM and route snapshots. MES records events, not mutable truth.
Inventory is ledger-first. eQMS links directly to PO/SO/WO/lot/serial/document.
